settings.content: Enter the Shopify variant IDs for your Standard and Premium products. Go to a product in your Shopify admin, click the variant, and copy the ID from the URL (the number after /variants/).

settings.label: Standard package — variant ID
settings.info: Shopify variant ID for the €20 Standard product

settings.label: Premium package — variant ID
settings.info: Shopify variant ID for the Premium product

settings.label: Standard price (€)
settings.info: Base price shown in the order form. Must match your Shopify variant price.

settings.label: Express/Premium price (€)
settings.info: Price shown when express delivery is selected. Must match your Shopify premium variant price.

settings.label: Standard compare-at price (€)
settings.info: Crossed-out 'original' price shown next to the standard price. Leave 0 to hide.

settings.label: Express compare-at price (€)
settings.info: Crossed-out 'original' price shown when express is selected. Leave 0 to hide.

settings.content: Prices shown in the order form for USD customers. Must match the prices in your US market catalog.

settings.label: Valid discount codes
settings.info: Comma-separated list of valid promo codes (e.g. SONG20,PROMO10). Case-insensitive.

settings.label: Discount percentage (%)
settings.info: Percentage off shown in the cart drawer when a code is applied. Must match the actual Shopify discount rule.
